zh.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas and Strathearn於1332年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾。她於1362年7月23日與Archibald Tyneman Douglas "the Tyneman" ( =Loser)結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年在她的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas and Strathearn于1332年出生在苏格兰洛包爾。她于1362年7月23日与Archibald Tyneman Douglas "the Tyneman" ( =Loser)结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年在她的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Limerick and Cork): variant of   Moore   4.
English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Mory, a pet form of Amauri (see Amery ).
English: perhaps also a variant of   Moore   1–3.

variants.name: Morrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Morey  .

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Moree
meanings: French (Morée): habitational name from a place so named in Loir-et-Cher.

variants.name: Morie
meanings: Altered form of Moree, itself perhaps an altered form of English or French Morey (compare 2 below) or of Irish Morrow .
English (London): variant of   Morey  . This surname is rare in Britain.
French: unexplained. This surname is rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas and Strathearn was born in 1332, in Roxburghshire, Scotland. She married Archibald Tyneman Douglas "the Tyneman" ( =Loser) on 23 July 1362. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1409, in her hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas and Strathearn est née en 1332, à Roxburghshire, Écosse. Elle a épousé Archibald Tyneman Douglas "the Tyneman" ( =Loser) le 23 juillet 1362. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1409, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1409 im Alter von 77 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas and Strathearnは1332年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた。1362年7月23日にArchibald Tyneman Douglas "the Tyneman" ( =Loser)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas and Strathearn(은)는 1332년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1362년 7월 23일 Archibald Tyneman Douglas "the Tyneman" ( =Loser)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 그녀의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas and Strathearn родилась в 1332 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archibald Tyneman Douglas "the Tyneman" ( =Loser) 23 июля 1362 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1409 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.
